title: Infinity Stone
body:
**Welcome To My Resource Packs**

**How To Get This Items**

**Commands:**

```
/give (username) minecraft:yellow_dye{CustomModelData:1}
```


```
/give (username) minecraft:purple_dye{CustomModelData:2}
```


```
/give (username) minecraft:red_dye{CustomModelData:3}
```


```
/give (username) minecraft:orange_dye{CustomModelData:4}
```


```
/give (username) minecraft:light_blue_dye{CustomModelData:5}
```


```
/give (username) minecraft:lime_dye{CustomModelData:6}
```

**Thank You And Enjoy**
